title: [ARCHIVED] Turtken
description:
Its the Turtken
(Continued on in Charken)
body:
# Turtken will recieve no further Updates
**Turtken will continue on in [Charken](https://modrinth.com/mod/charken)**

<details>
<summary>Conversion Guide</summary>

# The latest Turtken is for converting to [Charken](https://modrinth.com/mod/charken)
Hold items you want to keep in you mainhand and they will automaticly be converted to the charken ones (still the same just with "charken:" intead of "turtken:")
**Requires Charken 1.6.1 or above**

</details>


# All the below is archived
## What this Mod Adds
The Turtken mod adds a big robust Turtle that attacks villagers and players and that is all it adds right now
### Where it is used for
Included in the Modpack [Charkenverse](https://modrinth.com/modpack/the-charkenverse)
